verse.name: v1
verse.lines: And everywhere I go I see You And everywhere I go I see You And everywhere I go I see You And everywhere I go I see You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord You're leading me With a cloud by day And then in the night The glow of a burning flame

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And You take my hand And You wash it clean I know the promised land Is light years ahead of me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And the eagle flies And the rivers run I look through the night And I can see the rising sun

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Well the grass will die And the flowers fall But Your Word's alive And it will be after all
